Retrieve generic drug names for antidiabetic medications

Source: R/drugs.R
get_antidiabetic_generics.Rd

spec_antidiabetic is a CompositeDrugSpec containing all versioned antidiabetic leaf specs: biguanide_v1, sulfonylurea_v1, meglitinide_v1, tzd_v1, alpha_glucosidase_v1, dpp4_v1, sglt2_v1, glp1_v1, insulin_v1, amylin_v1.

Usage

get_antidiabetic_generics(component = NULL)

Arguments

component

Required. Component name. Print spec_antidiabetic to see all available names.

Value

Character vector of GNN strings (upper-case).

See also

spec_antidiabetic

On this page
